data.title: Fastenal reports 2025 Q4 earnings, with revenues in the millions, focusing on industrial and construction supplies.
data.description: Winona, Minnesota-based Fastenal Company (Nasdaq:FAST), an industry leader in the wholesale distribution of industrial and construction supplies, has released its financial results for the quarter and full year concluding on December 31, 2025. Unless specifically indicated otherwise, figures are in millions. The company did not provide specific numbers in this announcement.
U.S. Bancorp announces Q4 2025 financial results.

data.title: Eaton (NYSE:ETN) to announce Q4 2025 earnings on Feb 3, 2026, before NY Stock Exchange opening; hosting call at 11 am ET. Webcast available.
data.description: Eaton, a leading intelligent power management company listed on the NYSE as ETN, is set to reveal its Q4 2025 earnings on February 3, 2026, prior to the opening of the NYSE. The company will conduct a conference call at 11 a.m. Eastern time on the same day to review the financial results for the period. Interested parties can join the call through a live webcast accessible via the Eaton website at www.eaton.co.

data.title: Alpine Income Property Trust buys Aspen property for $10 million, 6,529 sq ft, 8.5% cap rate, $187k avg income in area.
data.description: Winter Park, Florida - In a recent announcement on January 20, 2026, Alpine Income Property Trust, Inc. revealed their latest investment in downtown Aspen, Colorado. The company successfully acquired a 6,529-square foot retail property for $10.0 million. This purchase was made at an initial cap rate of 8.5%, featuring 1.25% annual escalators. The deal was structured as a 50-year absolute triple net master lease with a renowned commercial real estate firm that specializes in retail project leasing. The prime location of the property in a sought-after retail corridor is highlighted by the area's average household income of $187,000 within a five-mile radius.

data.title: Electronic Hydrofluoric Acid Market projected to reach $1.87 billion by 2030. MarketsandMarkets report details grades, types, applications.
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, on January 20, 2026, the electronic hydrofluoric acid market was reported by MarketsandMarkets. The market is segmented based on grade, including EL Grade, UP Grade, UP-S, UP-SS, and UP-SSS. The types of hydrofluoric acid include fluorosilicic acid-based and fluorite-based. This market caters to various applications such as semiconductor wafers, solar cells, flat panel displays, and more. The information was not disclosed regarding the total market size or specific numerical data.

data.title: Magna Mining announces Q4 2025 production results from McCreedy West Mine in Sudbury, Ontario.
data.description: On January 20, 2026, Magna Mining Inc. shared its Q4 2025 production outcomes from the McCreedy West Mine in Sudbury, Ontario. The mine is situated in the North Range of the Sudbury Basin. Magna is listed on TSXV as NICU, OTCQX as MGMNF, and FSE as 8YD.

data.title: In 2025, AIRA awarded 29 CIRA certifications for financial advisory in bankruptcy, restructuring, and turnaround practice areas.
data.description: On January 20, 2026, in Medford, Oregon, it was highlighted that providing financial advisory services in business turnaround, restructuring, and bankruptcy demands specific expertise and substantial experience. The American Insolvency and Restructuring Association (AIRA) was founded in 1992 and finalized the certification process for Insolvency and Restructuring Administrators. This certification has since become a renowned standard in the industry, with a growing number of professionals seeking this qualification to enhance their skills and credibility in the field.

data.title: KeyCorp announces changes in board members: Antonio DeSpirito and Christopher Henson nominated, Todd Vasos appointed Lead Independent Director. Carlton Highsmith and Ruth Ann Gillis to retire at 2026 Annual Meeting.
data.description: KeyCorp (NYSE: KEY) revealed today that Antonio DeSpirito and Christopher Henson are set to be proposed for election at the 2026 Annual Meeting. Additionally, Todd Vasos has been named Lead Independent Director. However, Carlton Highsmith and Ruth Ann Gillis will retire at the mentioned meeting. This news was announced in Cleveland on January 20, 2026.
